generator: promoted from accepted model-assay painted-realism albedo-only set after user visual acceptance
target_use: Canonical Sherman default runtime texture set for separated kit body, barrel, bow MG, wheels, and authored tread ribbons

visual_doctrine.accepted_read: user accepted canonical model-assay tank texture/body/tread read on 2026-07-04
visual_doctrine.primary_rule: The albedo must carry the tank. PBR maps may be derived later, but they must not rescue a weak base color map.
visual_doctrine.default_identity: boring default Sherman field-maintained olive drab with dust, grime, wear, and non-black gun/barrel material language
visual_doctrine.variant_policy: Alpha/Bravo/Tango/Delta commander variants should derive from this default language without changing the canonical mesh/tread contract.

runtime_policy.legacy_pbr_folder_policy: preserve sherman_runtime_pbr_v1 for comparison and possible derived maps, but active default uses albedo-only maps.
